name: Acontext Skill Memory
description: Acontext skill memory — auto-capture, auto-learn, sync skills to OpenClaw native directory

baseUrl.label: API Base URL
baseUrl.help: Acontext API base URL (override for self-hosted deployments)

userId.label: User ID
userId.help: Scope sessions and skills per user

learningSpaceId.label: Learning Space ID
learningSpaceId.help: Explicit Learning Space ID (auto-created if omitted)

skillsDir.label: Skills Directory
skillsDir.help: Local directory where learned skills are synced for native OpenClaw loading

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Store conversation messages to Acontext after each agent turn

autoLearn.label: Auto-Learn
autoLearn.help: Trigger skill distillation from sessions automatically

minTurnsForLearn.label: Min Turns for Auto-Learn
minTurnsForLearn.help: Minimum conversation turns before triggering auto-learn
